From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[astronomy](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/astronomy "wiktionary:astronomy")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**[Astronomy](/wiki/Astronomy "Astronomy")** is a natural science that studies celestial objects and the phenomena that occur in the cosmos.

**Astronomy** may also refer to:

## Music

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Astronomy_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Music")]

### Albums

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Astronomy_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Albums")]

* [*Astronomy* (Bleach album)](/wiki/Astronomy_(Bleach_album) "Astronomy (Bleach album)"), 2003
* [*Astronomy* (Dragonland album)](/wiki/Astronomy_(Dragonland_album) "Astronomy (Dragonland album)"), 2006

### Songs

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Astronomy_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Songs")]

* ["Astronomy" (song)](/wiki/Astronomy_(song) "Astronomy (song)"), a 1974 song by Blue Öyster Cult
* ["Astronomy" (Conan Gray song)](/wiki/Astronomy_(Conan_Gray_song) "Astronomy (Conan Gray song)"), 2022

## Publications

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Astronomy_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Publications")]

* [*Astronomy* (journal)](/wiki/Astronomy_(journal) "Astronomy (journal)"), a Swiss academic journal
* [*Astronomy* (magazine)](/wiki/Astronomy_(magazine) "Astronomy (magazine)"), an American magazine

## Other uses

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Astronomy_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Other uses")]

* "Astronomy", an [episode of the television series *QI*](/wiki/List_of_QI_episodes#ep2 "List of QI episodes")
